title: stipa minor
intro: Stipa minor, also known as the lesser quaking grass or quaking grass, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stipa minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Stipa minor is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder for teas or capsules.
